# 个人简介Personal Profile

**个人介绍：**

叶林涛，华中科技大学人工智能与自动化学院副教授、硕士生导师。2015年获华中科技大学本科学位，2017年和2020年分别获美国普渡大学硕士和博士学位，2020-2021年于美国圣母大学从事博士后研究。主要研究方向包括：优化算法、控制理论、机器学习、强化学习等。近年来，在IEEE Transactions on Automatic Control (TAC)、Automatica、SIAM Journal on Control and Optimization (SICON) 等国际期刊发表论文十余篇。详情请见： [https://sites.google.com/view/lintao-ye](https://sites.google.com/view/lintao-ye)

**研究方向：**

**设计具有可解释性和性能保障的优化算法及人工智能算法， 包括以下主要方向：**

**（1）基于强化学习的模型未知动态系统最优控制与观测；**

**（2）在线优化和序贯决策问题；**

**（3）基于次摸性的组合优化；**

**（4）大规模和分布式系统中的强化学习问题；**

**（5）强化学习算法在无人系统集群、大规模电力系统中的应用。**

招生信息：

课题组常年招收感兴趣的本科生、硕士生、博士生以及博士后进组从事相关研究工作，需要申请人具有较强的数学基础、编程能力和英语水平，具备自我激励和持之以恒的精神，以自身兴趣为驱动从事关键科学问题研究。（详情请发送邮件至yelintao93@hust.edu.cn）

**部分代表性研究成果：**

\[1\]**L. Ye**, M. Chi, Z. W. Liu, X. Wang, V. Gupta, " _Online mixed discrete and continuous optimization: Algorithms, regret analysis and applications._" Automatica, vol. 175, pp. 112189, 2025. \[[link](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S0005109825000822)\]\[ [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2309.07630)\]

\[2\] **L. Ye**, M. Chi, Z.W. Liu, V. Gupta, " _Online actuator selection and controller design for linear quadratic regulation with unknown system model_." IEEE Transactions on Automatic Control, vol. 70, iss. 1, pp 18-33, 2025. \[ [link](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/10582506)\] \[ [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2201.10197)\]

\[3\] **L. Ye**, M. Chi, R. Liao, V. Gupta, " _Learning decentralized linear quadratic regulator with squared root T regret._" SIAM Journal on Control and Optimization, vol. 62, iss. 6, pp. 3341-3368, 2024. \[ [link](https://epubs.siam.org/doi/abs/10.1137/23M161714X)\]\[ [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2210.08886)\]

\[4\] **L. Ye**, M. Figura, Y. Lin, M. Pal, P. Das, J. Liu, V. Gupta, " _Resilient multi-agent reinforcement learning with function approximation._" IEEE Transactions on Automatic Control, vol. 69, iss. 12, pp. 8497-8512, 2024. \[[link](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/10549785)\]

\[5\] **L. Ye**, Z.W. Liu, M. Chi, V. Gupta, " _Maximization of nonsubmodular functions under multiple constraints with applications._" Automatica, vol. 155, pp. 11126, 2023. \[[link](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S0005109823002868)\] \[ [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2305.04254)\]

\[6\] **L. Ye**, H. Zhu, V. Gupta, " _On the sample complexity of decentralized linear quadratic regulator with partially nested information structure._" IEEE Transactions on Automatic Control, vol. 68, iss. 8, pp. 4841-4856, 2023. \[[link](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/abstract/document/9925263)\] \[[arXiv\]](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2110.07112)

\[7\] **L. Ye**, P. E. Paré, S. Sundaram, " _Parameter estimation in epidemic spread networks using limited measurements._" SIAM Journal on Control and Optimization, vol. 60, iss. 2, pp. S49-S74, 2022. \[[link](https://epubs.siam.org/doi/abs/10.1137/20M1377801)\] \[ [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2105.04750)\]

\[8\] **L. Ye**, N. Woodford, S. Roy, S. Sundaram, " _On the complexity and approximability of optimal sensor selection and attack for Kalman filtering._" IEEE Transactions on Automatic Control, vol. 66, iss. 5, pp. 2146-2161, 2021. \[[link](https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/abstract/document/9134889)\] \[ [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2003.11951)\]
